title: The Vibrating Darkness
lines: The hum is deafening now, a physical force that vibrates in your chest and makes the terminal on your wrist flicker with static.
You see movement in the shadows—monstrous, iridescent wings beating against the steel beams. The 'workers' of this factory are returning to their hive.
The floor is covered in a slick, golden residue that makes every step a gamble. One slip could mean the end of your journey.

options.desc: 1. Attempt to hide beneath a rusted conveyor belt
2. Carefully retreat to the factory entrance
